title: Rewire generation pipeline to use KV-cache
description:
Modify `GenerationPipeline::generate()` in `pipeline.rs` to use KV-cache instead of recomputing the full sequence every decode step.

Current flow (O(n²)):

loop { model.forward(ALL_TOKENS); sample; push }


Target flow (O(n)):

kv_cache = KVCache::new(max_seq, config);
logits = model.forward_prefill(prompt, &mut kv_cache);  // prefill once
loop { logits = model.forward_one(token, &mut kv_cache); sample; }  // decode 1 token


The KVCache struct already exists in `kv_cache/cache.rs` with FFI backing. Wire it into the pipeline.

Also update `InferenceEngine` in `engine.rs` to create the KVCache and pass it to the pipeline.

**Tests (REQUIRED):**
- Generate 20 tokens with KV-cache: output token IDs IDENTICAL to full-recompute generation (deterministic seed)
- Verify KV-cache memory: exactly `2 * num_layers * max_seq * n_kv_heads * head_dim * 4` bytes
- Generation with eos_token_id stops correctly with KV-cache path

**Benchmark (HARD threshold):**
- Decode throughput with KV-cache ≥ 10× vs without cache at 64 generated tokens
